TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Banaw, title = Banaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banaw} }

S.FORM: Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Banaw a niyaro', 375 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 885 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 45% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 398 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 55% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 487 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 38%, Truku 2%, Tayal 2%, roma 2%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Banaw I Hualinsing. nu Suhungsiyang hawi, ira ku Banaw hananay a niyaru. Nikawrira caay kabana:'en. no tamdaw kiraniyau'. ano Liitan Banaw hani awaay ku caay kabana'. saka i tepar no Liitan ku Banaw hananay a niyaru. Pakayni nika cieci nu sa'uwac a masupsup ku nanum. sabanaw satu. U saka'urip nu itiniay a tamdaw i. tolo^ no cecay i tadu sanay a mifuting i banaw. Makapah tingalaw ku nanum, itila saka mibuting ku heni tusa'urip, nikawrira yu masadak ku cidal atu mucelem ko cidal i, masaruma a ma'araw tada bangcal a mamelaw kuna banaw tingalawsa matiya u dehepicay a kidudung samisisa a mamelaw kuni sampuay a tamedaw, yu feriw sa ku bali i. mitaelif ku lunan haw i. matiya sa u nikasarayaraya i cedas nu nanum. anu 'amilik ku parakat nu parakatay tu lunan i, matungal ku tapelik nu nanum bangcal sa melawan. U banaw a pisalamaan itini I Hualin away kucaay kabana' nu kapah tinapisalamaan. nikawrira ira henay ku kapahay a pisalamaan. u piluinan u pisalamaan nu kapah. U banaw hananay a niyaru' u micidekay a niyaru' caay ka dadahal. nikawrira u itiniay a tamdaw i masasiulaulah mapapadapadang. masapakuyucay kinaniyaru', u niyaru' ni ama aku, u tumuk nu banaw ci baki aku, saka yu wawa henay kami itini ku tu'as aku saka lipahak sakaku itini a misalama. U rumasa tu, mahakulung kaku ci bayian a midudu tu ciris a mipaheku saka pamutek saku mata amimelaw tu luengllay a papah nu paheku caaytu kabana' a makaripa' tu bekeluh. rumasatu u paheku tuku melawan matulu' tu i ciris. malaklak i nanum ku paheku, matalaw a malaliw ni bayi hawi caaytu pisapud. satawataway sa a midudu' ci bayian, mamelaw ni bayi mararemed ku beduy aku. ala satu ci bayi tu tata'akay a papah nu paheku cilecileminan ku papah. inian a demak cacay kapawan kaku. Saka banabanaw! A niyaru' u bangcalay mipalahaday tu tuas aku. Maulahk aku u kakininen aku kisu!
S.PHON: itiniaj i sħo~uo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u b~b~vanaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. b~b~vanaw i ħo~u~uaɾinsiŋ. no~u~u so~u~uħo~u~uŋsijaŋ ħawi, ira ko~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u. nikawrira ʦaaj kab~b~vana:ʡən. no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kiranijao~u~uʡ. ano~u ɾiitan b~b~vanaw ħani awaaj ko~u~u ʦaaj kab~b~vanaʡ. saka i təpar no~u ɾiitan ko~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u. pakajni nika ʦiəʦi no~u~u saʡo~u~uwaʦ a maso~u~upso~u~up ko~u~u nano~u~um. sab~b~vanaw sato~u~u. o~u~u sakaʡo~u~urip no~u~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i. to~uɾo~uʔ no~u ʦəʦaj i taɬ~ɮo~u~u sanaj a mifo~u~utiŋ i b~b~vanaw. makapaħ tiŋaɾaw ko~u~u nano~u~um, itiɾa saka mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ ko~u~u ħəni to~u~usaʡo~u~urip, nikawrira jo~u~u masaɬ~ɮak ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u~u mo~u~uʦəɾəm ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, masaro~u~uma a maʡaraw taɬ~ɮa b~b~vaŋʦaɾ a maməɾaw ko~u~una b~b~vanaw tiŋaɾawsa matija o~u~u ɬ~ɮəħəpiʦaj a kiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ samisisa a maməɾaw ko~u~uni sampo~u~uaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, jo~u~u fəriw sa ko~u~u b~b~vaɾi i. mitaəɾif ko~u~u ɾo~u~unan ħaw i. matija sa o~u~u nikasarajaraja i ʦəɬ~ɮas no~u~u nano~u~um. ano~u~u ʡamiɾik ko~u~u parakat no~u~u parakataj to~u~u ɾo~u~unan i, mato~u~uŋaɾ ko~u~u tapəɾik no~u~u nano~u~um b~b~vaŋʦaɾ sa məɾawan. o~u~u b~b~vanaw a pisaɾamaan itini i ħo~u~uaɾin awaj ko~u~uʦaaj kab~b~vanaʡ no~u~u kapaħ tinapisaɾamaan. nikawrira ira ħənaj ko~u~u kapaħaj a pisaɾamaan. o~u~u piɾo~u~uinan o~u~u pisaɾamaan no~u~u kapaħ. o~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a nijaro~u~uʡ ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ. nikawrira o~u~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i masasio~u~uɾao~u~uɾaħ mapapaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ. masapako~u~ujo~u~uʦaj kinanijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ ni ama ako~u~u, o~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u b~b~vanaw ʦi b~b~vaki ako~u~u, saka jo~u~u wawa ħənaj kami itini ko~u~u to~u~uʡas ako~u~u saka ɾipaħak sakako~u~u itini a misaɾama. o~u~u ro~u~umasa to~u~u, maħako~u~uɾo~u~uŋ kako~u~u ʦi b~b~vajian a miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u to~u~u ʦiris a mipaħəko~u~u saka pamo~u~utək sako~u~u mata amiməɾaw to~u~u ɾo~u~uəŋɾɾaj a papaħ no~u~u paħəko~u~u ʦaajto~u~u kab~b~vanaʡ a makaripaʡ to~u~u b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ. ro~u~umasato~u~u o~u~u paħəko~u~u to~u~uko~u~u məɾawan mato~u~uɾo~u~uʡ to~u~u i ʦiris. maɾakɾak i nano~u~um ko~u~u paħəko~u~u, mataɾaw a maɾaɾiw ni b~b~vaji ħawi ʦaajto~u~u pisapo~u~uɬ~ɮ. satawatawaj sa a miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʡ ʦi b~b~vajian, maməɾaw ni b~b~vaji mararəməɬ~ɮ ko~u~u b~b~vəɬ~ɮo~u~uj ako~u~u. aɾa sato~u~u ʦi b~b~vaji to~u~u tataʡakaj a papaħ no~u~u paħəko~u~u ʦiɾəʦiɾəminan ko~u~u papaħ. inian a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaʦaj kapawan kako~u~u. saka b~b~vanab~b~vanaw! a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u b~b~vaŋʦaɾaj mipaɾaħaɬ~ɮaj to~u~u to~u~uas ako~u~u. mao~u~uɾaħk ako~u~u o~u~u kakininən ako~u~u kiso~u~u!
S.FORM: Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Banaw a niyaro', 375 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 885 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 45% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 398 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 55% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 487 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 38%, Truku 2%, Tayal 2%, roma 2%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Banaw I Hualinsing. nu Suhungsiyang hawi, ira ku Banaw hananay a niyaru. Nikawrira caay kabana:'en. no tamdaw kiraniyau'. ano Liitan Banaw hani awaay ku caay kabana'. saka i tepar no Liitan ku Banaw hananay a niyaru. Pakayni nika cieci nu sa'uwac a masupsup ku nanum. sabanaw satu. U saka'urip nu itiniay a tamdaw i. tolo^ no cecay i tadu sanay a mifuting i banaw. Makapah tingalaw ku nanum, itila saka mibuting ku heni tusa'urip, nikawrira yu masadak ku cidal atu mucelem ko cidal i, masaruma a ma'araw tada bangcal a mamelaw kuna banaw tingalawsa matiya u dehepicay a kidudung samisisa a mamelaw kuni sampuay a tamedaw, yu feriw sa ku bali i. mitaelif ku lunan haw i. matiya sa u nikasarayaraya i cedas nu nanum. anu 'amilik ku parakat nu parakatay tu lunan i, matungal ku tapelik nu nanum bangcal sa melawan. U banaw a pisalamaan itini I Hualin away kucaay kabana' nu kapah tinapisalamaan. nikawrira ira henay ku kapahay a pisalamaan. u piluinan u pisalamaan nu kapah. U banaw hananay a niyaru' u micidekay a niyaru' caay ka dadahal. nikawrira u itiniay a tamdaw i masasiulaulah mapapadapadang. masapakuyucay kinaniyaru', u niyaru' ni ama aku, u tumuk nu banaw ci baki aku, saka yu wawa henay kami itini ku tu'as aku saka lipahak sakaku itini a misalama. U rumasa tu, mahakulung kaku ci bayian a midudu tu ciris a mipaheku saka pamutek saku mata amimelaw tu luengllay a papah nu paheku caaytu kabana' a makaripa' tu bekeluh. rumasatu u paheku tuku melawan matulu' tu i ciris. malaklak i nanum ku paheku, matalaw a malaliw ni bayi hawi caaytu pisapud. satawataway sa a midudu' ci bayian, mamelaw ni bayi mararemed ku beduy aku. ala satu ci bayi tu tata'akay a papah nu paheku cilecileminan ku papah. inian a demak cacay kapawan kaku. Saka banabanaw! A niyaru' u bangcalay mipalahaday tu tuas aku. Maulahk aku u kakininen aku kisu!
S.PHON: itiniaj i sħo~uo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u b~b~vanaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. b~b~vanaw i ħo~u~uaɾinsiŋ. no~u~u so~u~uħo~u~uŋsijaŋ ħawi, ira ko~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u. nikawrira ʦaaj kab~b~vana:ʡən. no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kiranijao~u~uʡ. ano~u ɾiitan b~b~vanaw ħani awaaj ko~u~u ʦaaj kab~b~vanaʡ. saka i təpar no~u ɾiitan ko~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~u. pakajni nika ʦiəʦi no~u~u saʡo~u~uwaʦ a maso~u~upso~u~up ko~u~u nano~u~um. sab~b~vanaw sato~u~u. o~u~u sakaʡo~u~urip no~u~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i. to~uɾo~uʔ no~u ʦəʦaj i taɬ~ɮo~u~u sanaj a mifo~u~utiŋ i b~b~vanaw. makapaħ tiŋaɾaw ko~u~u nano~u~um, itiɾa saka mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ ko~u~u ħəni to~u~usaʡo~u~urip, nikawrira jo~u~u masaɬ~ɮak ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u~u mo~u~uʦəɾəm ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, masaro~u~uma a maʡaraw taɬ~ɮa b~b~vaŋʦaɾ a maməɾaw ko~u~una b~b~vanaw tiŋaɾawsa matija o~u~u ɬ~ɮəħəpiʦaj a kiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ samisisa a maməɾaw ko~u~uni sampo~u~uaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, jo~u~u fəriw sa ko~u~u b~b~vaɾi i. mitaəɾif ko~u~u ɾo~u~unan ħaw i. matija sa o~u~u nikasarajaraja i ʦəɬ~ɮas no~u~u nano~u~um. ano~u~u ʡamiɾik ko~u~u parakat no~u~u parakataj to~u~u ɾo~u~unan i, mato~u~uŋaɾ ko~u~u tapəɾik no~u~u nano~u~um b~b~vaŋʦaɾ sa məɾawan. o~u~u b~b~vanaw a pisaɾamaan itini i ħo~u~uaɾin awaj ko~u~uʦaaj kab~b~vanaʡ no~u~u kapaħ tinapisaɾamaan. nikawrira ira ħənaj ko~u~u kapaħaj a pisaɾamaan. o~u~u piɾo~u~uinan o~u~u pisaɾamaan no~u~u kapaħ. o~u~u b~b~vanaw ħananaj a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a nijaro~u~uʡ ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ. nikawrira o~u~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i masasio~u~uɾao~u~uɾaħ mapapaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ. masapako~u~ujo~u~uʦaj kinanijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ ni ama ako~u~u, o~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u b~b~vanaw ʦi b~b~vaki ako~u~u, saka jo~u~u wawa ħənaj kami itini ko~u~u to~u~uʡas ako~u~u saka ɾipaħak sakako~u~u itini a misaɾama. o~u~u ro~u~umasa to~u~u, maħako~u~uɾo~u~uŋ kako~u~u ʦi b~b~vajian a miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u to~u~u ʦiris a mipaħəko~u~u saka pamo~u~utək sako~u~u mata amiməɾaw to~u~u ɾo~u~uəŋɾɾaj a papaħ no~u~u paħəko~u~u ʦaajto~u~u kab~b~vanaʡ a makaripaʡ to~u~u b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ. ro~u~umasato~u~u o~u~u paħəko~u~u to~u~uko~u~u məɾawan mato~u~uɾo~u~uʡ to~u~u i ʦiris. maɾakɾak i nano~u~um ko~u~u paħəko~u~u, mataɾaw a maɾaɾiw ni b~b~vaji ħawi ʦaajto~u~u pisapo~u~uɬ~ɮ. satawatawaj sa a miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʡ ʦi b~b~vajian, maməɾaw ni b~b~vaji mararəməɬ~ɮ ko~u~u b~b~vəɬ~ɮo~u~uj ako~u~u. aɾa sato~u~u ʦi b~b~vaji to~u~u tataʡakaj a papaħ no~u~u paħəko~u~u ʦiɾəʦiɾəminan ko~u~u papaħ. inian a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaʦaj kapawan kako~u~u. saka b~b~vanab~b~vanaw! a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u b~b~vaŋʦaɾaj mipaɾaħaɬ~ɮaj to~u~u to~u~uas ako~u~u. mao~u~uɾaħk ako~u~u o~u~u kakininən ako~u~u kiso~u~u!
